# Vendored doctest

Bennu vendors doctest v2.5.3 at exact upstream commit
`2d0a9359a60c51affe2a9bebb1be1dca47868151`.

Upstream: https://github.com/doctest/doctest
Header source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/doctest/doctest/2d0a9359a60c51affe2a9bebb1be1dca47868151/doctest/doctest.h
License source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/doctest/doctest/2d0a9359a60c51affe2a9bebb1be1dca47868151/LICENSE.txt

The vendored code is licensed under the MIT License; the unmodified upstream
license is retained as `LICENSE.txt`. Keeping the single header in-tree makes
configure, build, test, and production runtime independent of the network.
